MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-01-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NICHOLAS, EDWARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 20 12TH STREET #214, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-08-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MASY ISSUE, BUT S/E TO 8-8-95. DEFT WAIVES ALL CLAIMS; SETTLEMENT IS GENERAL RELEASE. NO FURTHER STAYS. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. IF DEFT VACATES PREMISES IN TIMELY MANNER & RETURNS KEGS TO MGR BY 12 NOON ON 8-8-95, PLTF WILL FILE DISMISSAL W/PREJUDICE.
